# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security fixes are released against the latest published version of Coffer (the most recent `ghcr.io/refringe/coffer` image and the `main` branch). Older releases are not patched; please keep your deployment up to date.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within Coffer, please email Refringe at me@refringe.com. **Please do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

You can expect an initial response within 48 hours acknowledging your report. All security vulnerabilities will be promptly addressed.

## Bug Bounty

Coffer is an open-source project and does not offer a bug bounty program. We appreciate responsible disclosure and will credit reporters in the fix commit where appropriate.
